stem: A ecology study surveys 40 sampled plots and observes 14 positive outcomes out of 40 (35.0%). Estimate the true species occurrence rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.35. Wilson 95% CI: [0.2213, 0.5049]. Point estimate: 0.3631.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
